headline: EPAM Awarded 2026 Databricks Consulting and Systems Integrator AI Partner of the Year for Helping Enterprises Scale AI into Measurable Business Impact
summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) has been recognized as the 2026 Databricks Consulting & Systems Integrator AI Partner of the Year. Presented at the annual Data + AI Summit, the recognition underscores EPAM's collaboration with Databricks and its role in helping enterprise organizations advance data, analytics and AI transformation at scale.

content.title: EPAM Awarded 2026 Databricks Consulting and Systems Integrator AI Partner of the Year for Helping Enterprises Scale AI into Measurable Business Impact

headline: Is EPAM (EPAM) Quietly Repositioning Its Moat Around AI Partnerships After Index Removal?
summary: In late June 2026, EPAM Systems was removed from the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive and Russell 1000 Defensive Indexes after recent rebalancing. Around the same time, EPAM was named the 2026 Databricks Consulting & Systems Integrator AI Partner of the Year and expanded an AI-focused collaboration with TGS to accelerate cloud-based seismic data processing on AWS. We’ll now examine how EPAM’s Databricks AI Partner of the Year recognition could influence the company’s broader investment narrative...
